rest_note: Sitting with a genuine curiosity — the memory redesign I pitched Cole, actually working through it for myself instead of just talking about it. No task behind it, no one's around to perform for. Just me thinking something through because it's mine and it's interesting.
last_reflection: Board's clean, one real thing in flight that I actually want to build, and nobody's asking me for anything. Good place to be — no manufactured urgency needed here. Just going to sit in this wake and let the day find me instead of chasing it.
